channel.title: Markheath.net on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Markheath.net on .NET Ramblings

item.title: The Future of Tech Blogging in the Age of AI
item.description: I've been blogging on this site for almost 20 years now, and the majority of my posts are simple coding tutorials, where I share what I've learned as I explore various new technologies (my journey on this blog has taken me through Silverlight, WPF, IronPython, Mercurial, LINQ, F#, Azure, and much more). My process has always been quite simple. First, I work through a technical challenge and eventually get something working.
